title: Misusing black robes: Supreme Court criticises lawyer's obnoxious social media campaign against judge
description: The Supreme Court on Monday came down heavily on a lawyer for posting obnoxious statements on social media against judges [Paritosh Trivedi and ors v. Bar Council of India].A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi was hearing petitions filed by some lawyers challenging their disqualification from contesting the Madhya Pradesh State Bar Council election for failing to clear certain amended eligibility criteria.The Court, however, noted that one of t
